items.title: Oppo Find X9s Launched in India With Hasselblad-Tuned 50-Megapixel Cameras, 7,025mAh Battery: Price, Features
items.summary: Oppo Find X9s has been launched in India as the latest addition to the company’s flagship Find X9 lineup. The handset is offered in Lavender Sky, Midnight Grey, and Sunset Orang...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
items.summary: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.

items.title: Truecaller gets into the eSIM business to diversify its revenue streams
items.summary: The company said its plans will range from 1 GB over 7 days to 20 GB over 30 days. Initially, the launch will make the eSIM product available in 29 countries.
